since_last: 58% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +5.57%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.17% · BTC +0.50% · Gold +1.49% · Nasdaq100 -0.64%. 58% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +5.57%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +5.57%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.75%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NOW is the standout at +9.12%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +9.12%, APP +8.16%, PUBM +7.47%, WDAY +7.28%, DV +6.94%. Laggards: TER -8.00%, NXPI -6.67%, VRT -6.43%, HPE -5.95%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.44% at $155.2
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.44% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
